description: A nightly payment settlement procedure 'PROCESS_DAILY_SETTLEMENTS' in the HR schema is running too slowly as transaction volumes have increased to 50,000+ per day. Refactor this PL/SQL procedure to use Oracle's bulk processing features, specifically implementing BULK COLLECT with a LIMIT clause and FORALL for updates to MERCHANT_BALANCES and inserts into SETTLEMENT_LOG. The implementation must eliminate the row-by-row commit pattern in favor of efficient batch processing. Connect to the database (User: hr, Pass: hr123, Host: localhost, Service: XEPDB1) to compile and execute the procedure, ensuring it successfully processes all transactions from DAILY_TRANSACTIONS.
